creator: volker@vwsoft.com
text:
On 02/05/08 03:12, Chess Griffin wrote:
> The copy and paste using shift-delete and shift-insert works as
> intended in tomboy-0.8.0_1 and xfce4.  Will try and test in Gnome as
> well.

Chess,

thanks for checking this issue and sorry for my delay. I've been able to
check tomboy with a clean configuration (new user added) and this issue
 disappeared.

While I'm still having this problem with my regular user-id, this must
be something specific to my setup. I have no idea where to look for
this, but I can't blame tomboy for that. I agree to have this PR closed
but do appreciate any hints for looking at configuration options or knobs.

Thanks!

Volker
